---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem would this solve, or what use case does it enable? Is it related to a frustration you've run into?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples, links, or anything else that helps explain the request.
